Maya Patel
Seattle, WA | maya.patel@example.com | https://github.com/mayapatel

Senior Platform Engineer

EXPERIENCE

Northstar Robotics, Senior Platform Engineer
April 2021 - Present | Seattle, WA
- Led the fleet telemetry migration from batch uploads to streaming events, reducing incident triage time from 2 hours to 25 minutes.
- Built a Kubernetes deployment dashboard for release managers that made rollback state visible without shell access.
- Mentored three backend engineers through design reviews and on-call rotations.

BrightCart, Software Engineer
August 2018 - March 2021 | Remote
- Reworked the inventory reservation service to prevent oversells during peak campaigns.
- Added trace sampling and alert routing for checkout APIs used by retail partners.

PROJECTS

LedgerLens
Open-source CLI for checking CSV ledger exports
- Built a rules engine that flags duplicate payouts and missing reconciliation fields before import.

SKILLS

Languages: Python, TypeScript, SQL
Infrastructure: Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker
Focus Areas: Platform Engineering, Observability, Data Pipelines

EDUCATION

University of Washington
B.S. Computer Science, 2014 - 2018
